Package com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder

Class GenerateContentRequestBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder.GenerateContentRequestBuilder
  • public class GenerateContentRequestBuilder
extends Object
    Builder for creating GenerateContentRequest instances in a fluent and intuitive way. This builder provides a comprehensive set of methods to configure all aspects of the request, including nested objects and lists.
    Since:
    0.0.2
    Author:
    Everson Novka <enovka@gmail.com>

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      GenerationConfig generationConfig  
      Content systemInstruction

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      GenerateContentRequest build()
      Builds a GenerateContentRequest instance based on the configured parameters.
      static GenerateContentRequestBuilder builder​(GeminiClient geminiClient)
      Creates a new instance of the GenerateContentRequestBuilder.
      GenerateContentRequestBuilder withCachedContent​(String cachedContent)
      Sets the optional cached content name for the generation request.
      GenerationConfigBuilder withGenerationConfig()
      Creates a new GenerationConfigBuilder for building the generation configuration.
      GenerateContentRequestBuilder withGenerationConfig​(GenerationConfig generationConfig)
      Sets the optional generation configuration for the generation request.
      SafetySettingBuilder withSafetySetting()
      Creates a new SafetySettingBuilder for building a safety setting.
      GenerateContentRequestBuilder withSafetySetting​(SafetySetting safetySetting)
      Adds a safety setting to the list of safety settings for the generation request.
      GenerateContentRequestBuilder withSafetySettingForToxicity​(HarmBlockThresholdEnum harmBlockThreshold)
      Adds a safety setting for toxicity with the specified block threshold.
      ContentBuilder withSystemInstruction()
      Creates a new ContentBuilder for building the system instruction.
      GenerateContentRequestBuilder withSystemInstructions​(String systemInstructions)
      Sets the optional system instructions for the generation request.
      ToolBuilder withTool()
      Creates a new ToolBuilder for building a tool.
      GenerateContentRequestBuilder withTool​(Tool tool)
      Adds a tool to the list of tools for the generation request.
      ToolConfigBuilder withToolConfig()
      Creates a new ToolConfigBuilder for building the tool configuration.
      GenerateContentRequestBuilder withToolConfig​(ToolConfig toolConfig)
      Sets the optional tool configuration for the generation request.
      GenerateContentRequestBuilder withUserInput​(String userInput)
      Sets the required user input for the generation request.

      • systemInstruction

        public GenerationConfig generationConfig

    • Method Detail

      • builder

        public static GenerateContentRequestBuilder builder​(GeminiClient geminiClient)
        Creates a new instance of the GenerateContentRequestBuilder.
        Parameters:
        geminiClient - The GeminiClient instance to use for API communication.
        Returns:
        A new GenerateContentRequestBuilder instance.

      • withUserInput

        public GenerateContentRequestBuilder withUserInput​(String userInput)
        Sets the required user input for the generation request.
        Parameters:
        userInput - The user's input text.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • withSystemInstructions

        public GenerateContentRequestBuilder withSystemInstructions​(String systemInstructions)
        Sets the optional system instructions for the generation request. If a string is provided, it will be automatically wrapped in a Content object with the role "system".
        Parameters:
        systemInstructions - The system instructions, either as a string or a Content object.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • withSystemInstruction

        public ContentBuilder withSystemInstruction()
        Creates a new ContentBuilder for building the system instruction.
        Returns:
        A new ContentBuilder instance.

      • withTool

        public GenerateContentRequestBuilder withTool​(Tool tool)
        Adds a tool to the list of tools for the generation request.
        Parameters:
        tool - The tool to add.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • withTool

        public ToolBuilder withTool()
        Creates a new ToolBuilder for building a tool.
        Returns:
        A new ToolBuilder instance.

      • withToolConfig

        public GenerateContentRequestBuilder withToolConfig​(ToolConfig toolConfig)
        Sets the optional tool configuration for the generation request.
        Parameters:
        toolConfig - The tool configuration to use.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • withToolConfig

        public ToolConfigBuilder withToolConfig()
        Creates a new ToolConfigBuilder for building the tool configuration.
        Returns:
        A new ToolConfigBuilder instance.

      • withSafetySetting

        public GenerateContentRequestBuilder withSafetySetting​(SafetySetting safetySetting)
        Adds a safety setting to the list of safety settings for the generation request.
        Parameters:
        safetySetting - The safety setting to add.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • withSafetySetting

        public SafetySettingBuilder withSafetySetting()
        Creates a new SafetySettingBuilder for building a safety setting.
        Returns:
        A new SafetySettingBuilder instance.

      • withSafetySettingForToxicity

        public GenerateContentRequestBuilder withSafetySettingForToxicity​(HarmBlockThresholdEnum harmBlockThreshold)
        Adds a safety setting for toxicity with the specified block threshold.
        Parameters:
        harmBlockThreshold - The harm block threshold for toxicity.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • withGenerationConfig

        public GenerateContentRequestBuilder withGenerationConfig​(GenerationConfig generationConfig)
        Sets the optional generation configuration for the generation request.
        Parameters:
        generationConfig - The generation configuration to use.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • withGenerationConfig

        public GenerationConfigBuilder withGenerationConfig()
        Creates a new GenerationConfigBuilder for building the generation configuration.
        Returns:
        A new GenerationConfigBuilder instance.

      • withCachedContent

        public GenerateContentRequestBuilder withCachedContent​(String cachedContent)
        Sets the optional cached content name for the generation request.
        Parameters:
        cachedContent - The name of the cached content to use.
        Returns:
        The builder instance for method chaining.

      • build

        public GenerateContentRequest build()
        Builds a GenerateContentRequest instance based on the configured parameters.
        Returns:
        The built GenerateContentRequest instance.
        Throws:
        IllegalArgumentException - If the user input is not set.
